title: daphne cneorum subsp. canescens
intro: Daphne cneorum subsp. canescens is a subspecies of the Daphne cneorum, commonly known as the pink or fragrant daphne, a small, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese and Greek medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Daphne cneorum subsp. canescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Daphne cneorum subsp. canescens can be prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, or teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
